hero.title:
Take Control of
 Remodeling Projects
 with BuilderTek
hero.description: BuilderTek remodeling software is built to manage scope changes, client requests, and cost adjustments without losing control. From centralized schedules to budgets, documents, and approvals- keep remodeling projects organized.

simplifyConstruction.title: Remodel with confidence with BuilderTek
simplifyConstruction.description:
One system to manage complex remodeling projects without confusion.

Remodeling projects call for frequent updates. BuilderTek remodeling management software gives a structured way to capture changes, track costs, and document decisions, without slowing execution.

tabs.name: Centralized Tracking
tabs.title: Centralized Tracking
tabs.description: Capture every scope adjustment with clear approvals, pricing, and revision history, ensuring changes are documented and agreed upon before work proceeds.

tabs.name: Live Budget Updates
tabs.title: Live Budget
tabs.description: Instantly see how changes impact project costs, allowing remodelers to address overruns early and maintain tighter budget control.

tabs.name: Integrated Documentation
tabs.title: Integrated
tabs.description: Store photos, notes, drawings, and reports in one place, making it easy to reference decisions and site conditions at any time.

tabs.name: Vendor Pricing Consistency
tabs.title: Vendor Pricing
tabs.description: Collect structured, standardized quotes from trade partners to reduce pricing discrepancies and improve bid comparisons.

tabs.name: Full Project History
tabs.title: Full Project
tabs.description: Maintain a complete record of changes, approvals, and communications for client reference, warranty needs, and future work.

tabs.name: Simplified Team Coordination
tabs.title: Simplified Team
tabs.description: Keep office staff, field crews, and vendors aligned through shared access to schedules, updates, and documentation

section.title: Get Complete Flexibility Without Any Risk with BuilderTek Remodeler Software
section.subtitle: Adapt fast while staying profitable for your remodeling projects. Connect budgets, schedules, documentation, and approvals, reduce uncertainty, limit disputes, and deliver projects with greater control and predictability

features.title: Controlled Scope Changes
features.description: Structured change management minimizes misunderstandings and ensures every update is clearly approved and priced.

features.title: Budget Accuracy
features.description: Real-time cost tracking helps remodelers understand the financial impact of changes before margins are affected.

features.title: Stronger Client Trust
features.description: Transparent records and clear communication build homeowner confidence and reduce friction throughout the remodel.

features.title: Less Administrative Work
features.description: Automated workflows and centralized data reduce manual tracking, freeing teams to focus on execution.

features.title: Repeatable Processes
features.description: Consistent workflows bring structure to every remodel, improving efficiency regardless of project size.

features.title: Fewer Delays & Disruptions
features.description: Better visibility into schedules and scope changes helps teams anticipate issues and keep work moving forward.

content.headline: Built for
points: BuilderTek’s foundation provides remodelers with reliability, audit-ready records, and flexibility, ensuring control even when conditions change.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: Can BuilderTek track frequent scope changes?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek is designed for change-heavy remodeling projects. Every scope update is captured with detailed cost impact, approvals, and revision history.

items.question: Does BuilderTek support notes and documentation?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek allows teams to store notes, quotes, and reports in a centralized, searchable location, making it easy to reference site conditions and decisions.

items.question: Can I manage multiple remodels simultaneously?
items.answer: Absolutely. BuilderTek provides centralized dashboards and project-level views that help remodelers track multiple active projects without losing visibility.

items.question: Is BuilderTek suitable for occupied-home remodels?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek supports detailed scheduling, documentation, and communication, helping teams coordinate work efficiently in occupied spaces while minimizing disruption to homeowners.

items.question: Can I integrate BuilderTek with an external calendar?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek supports integration with external calendar systems, allowing schedules and key project dates to sync with commonly used calendar tools.
